property.name: nextUrl
property.label: Next URL
property.description: URL to navigate to on Next button click

property.name: backUrl
property.label: Back URL
property.description: URL to navigate to on Back button click

property.name: finishUrl
property.label: Finish URL
property.description: URL to navigate to on Finish button click

property.name: buttonAlignment
property.label: Button Alignment
property.description: Align buttons to left, right, or center

property.name: nextState
property.label: Next State
property.description: Is set to Next State Value when Next button is pressed

property.name: nextStateValue
property.label: Next State Value
property.description: The Value Next State is set to when Next is pressed

property.name: variant
property.label: Button Variant
property.description: The button variant defaults to Brand

property.name: isButton
property.label: Display as Button?
property.description: If checked, a button is displayed otherwise a link is displayed instead

property.name: isDisabled
property.label: Is the button/link disabled
property.description: If checked, the button/link is disabled
